text:
"Peaceful Times (choeur)" is a song from the film Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo. It is track 14 in the album Music from Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo, disc 2. https://vgmdb.net/album/35707 

In the film, the song is featured in the Final preview at the end of Evangelion 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo when Evangelion Unit 8+2 is seen fighting against unknown enemies. 

Three other versions exist: a children's choir-version with both verses present on the original album and two additional versions on the CD Outtakes from EVANGELION Vol. 1.

Lyrics

 
This time is like no other for us in living memory
(Long may it last.)
Breathe the air, take in the feeling of peace and harmony!
Freedom can fly, close to the sky
Now we can shine, Peace in time, we've never had it so close! 

Through sacrifice, children can play in a world without a care
(Now that we know)
All is safe, learn from the past and through knowledge we can share
All of the good, all of the time
Spirit is high, Peace in time, we've never had it so close!
